allow: PowerShell($git = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe"; Write-Output "=== .gitignore contents ==="; if \(Test-Path .gitignore\) { Get-Content .gitignore } else { Write-Output "\(no .gitignore\)" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Files git would track \(respecting .gitignore\) ==="; & $git ls-files --others --exclude-standard --cached; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Top-level directory contents \(for context\) ==="; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Mode, Name)
